arts.ttl: Three talking points from Barcelona 4-1 Girona
arts.sum: Eric Garcia isn’t a player who gets the plaudits very often but he’s clearly a favourite of Hansi Flick’s and enjoyed a special day on Sunday. 139 - No @LaLigaEN side have ever scored 139 goals after 45 games played in all competitions than the Hans-Dieter Flick's @FCBarcelona in this 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: ‘That’ s what I really love about my team’ - Flick makes Barca admission
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick revealed he absolutely loves his team’s voracious appetite for goals after seeing his men put four past Girona on Sunday . The result means that Barcelona now have 139 goals in 45 games this season, a feat that has never been done before by a La Liga team.

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski speaks out on Barcelona future
arts.sum: Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski has this weekend provided an insight into his plans for the future. The name of frontman Lewandowski has of course proven a prominent one in the…

arts.ttl: European soccer review: Barcelona extend unbeaten run to 20
arts.sum: It was the 20th time this season Barça have scored four or more goals in a competitive game. Man City score two goals in the second half to beat Bournemouth 2-1 in the FA Cup quarterfinals.

arts.ttl: Flick’s goal crazy Barca make history against Girona
arts.sum: 25 - Robert Lewandowski is the first @LaLigaEN player to score 25 goals in his first 28 games of a season since Lionel Messi for @FCBarcelona in 2018/19 campaign (29 goals). 139 - No @LaLigaEN side have ever scored 139 goals after 45 games played in all competitions than the Hans-Dieter Flick's @FCBarcelona in this 2024/25 season.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick admits Barcelona star asked not to play vs Girona
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has confirmed that Raphinha’s absence from his line-up to face Girona came owing to a slight fitness concern. Barcelona were of course back in action…

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Gyokeres move CONFIRMED, Barcelona deal SOON, Real Madrid TOP TARGET
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Gyokeres move CONFIRMED, Barcelona deal SOON, Real Madrid TOP TARGET Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Viktor Gyokeres, Wojciech Szczesny and Carlo Ancelotti.

arts.ttl: Flick explains why Raphinha didn’t start for Barca vs Girona
arts.sum: “We need fresh legs, but we also know it’s a difficult match and that we have another tough one coming up. Raphinha ended up staying on the bench for the whole 90 minutes as Barca eased to victory in the Catalan derby.

arts.ttl: ‘A lot of people talk about my age’ - Lewandowski bites back after Barca brace
arts.sum: If you score four goals, you can always say we played a very good game.” I know that if I score two goals, I’ll be helping my team.
